# slotNames

**Instance Property**

A list of identifiers for all the Smart Card reader slots available to the system.

## Declaration

```swift
var slotNames: [String] { get }
```

## Discussion

Use Key-Value Observing on this property to be notified for changes to available Smart Card reader slots. For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Cocoa/Conceptual/KeyValueObserving/KeyValueObserving.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/10000177i].

## Accessing Smart Card Slots

- **getSlot(withName:reply:)**: Asynchronously calls a block with a Smart Card reader slot for a specified name.
- **slotNamed(_:)**: Returns the Smart Card slot with a given name.
